svg.text: 16 dashboards: Cilium · Hubble · Istio · Flux · Falco · Tetragon · Kubescape · cert-manager · Node Exporter · OTel Collector
Prometheus also exposed via HTTPProxy: prometheus.local:8080
additionalScrapeConfigs → Cilium · Falco · Tetragon · Kyverno · Kubescape · Flux (no ServiceMonitor CRD circular dependency)
Loki: Promtail pod logs + Falcosidekick alerts · OTel Collector: OTLP spans from all Istio Envoy sidecars → Tempo
generates istio_requests_total metrics → OTLP traces → OTel
iperf3: nginx stream{} → ClusterIP Service · port 32111
RUNTIME SECURITY LAYER · cross-cutting across all workloads

text.tspan: — validates pods at admission time (before scheduling) · Audit mode · PSS baseline · resource limits · image tag enforcement
— eBPF kernel-level enforcement · traces process exec / network / file I/O on every node · events exported to Loki
— behavioral runtime detection · shell spawning · sensitive file reads · credential exposure · alerts → Loki via Falcosidekick
— NSA + MITRE continuous compliance scan · configurationScan + continuousScan · posture metrics on :8080 → Prometheus

svg.text: Five-layer defense: prevent (Kyverno) · enforce (Tetragon) · detect & alert (Falco) · audit posture (Kubescape) · scan CVEs (Trivy)
